n: Book 11, Chapter 1: Too Great a Need

steps.t: Your companions are in Nona's Cave in the High Knolls of Wildermore. Horn wishes to speak with you about the road ahead.
Corudan is in Nona's Cave in the High Knolls, in Wildermore. Horn has asked you to speak with Corudan and Gléowine about the course he has suggested.
